name: VR火灾逃生应急演练(VR fire emergency simulation system)
developer: 宏兴(北京）科技有限公司
publisher: 宏兴(北京）科技有限公司
short_description: The VR fire evacuation emergency drill system enables participants to master fire evacuation skills and understand correct emergency measures through immersive simulation operations. The program built-in Chinese version and English version, you can switch within the program.
detailed_description:
VR Fire Escape Emergency Exercise System is a fire emergency simulation program produced by Hong Xing (Beijing) Technology Co., Ltd. It aims to make the experience masters the fire escape skills and understand through the immersive simulation operation Correct emergency measures to reduce their own injury.

The program built-in Chinese version and English version, you can switch within the program.

The VR hardware device used for the development and testing of this program is HTC VIVE. The operation status of VR hardware devices from other brands is unknown. Please be aware.
